Klasse History

java.lang.Object
persistance.History
public class History extends Object
This class is responsible for managing the history of moves made in the game. It allows for undoing and redoing moves, as well as storing the current state of the game.

The history is represented by two stacks: one for undoing moves and another for redoing them.

  • Felddetails

    • undoMoves

      private Stack<Move> undoMoves

  • Konstruktordetails

    • History

      public History()

  • Methodendetails

    • addMove

      public void addMove(Move move)
      Stores a performed move containing the state of the game to a Stack.

      Clears the redo stack, as this method gets only called when performing a new move, invalidating the other "reality".

      Parameter:
      move - The move that should be stored.

    • undoMove

      public Move undoMove()
      Undoes the last move by popping it from the undo stack and pushing it onto the redo stack.

      Returns the new top of the undo stack, representing the previous game state. If there are not enough moves to undo, returns null.

      Gibt zurück:
      The previous game state (second last move), or null if undo is not possible.

    • redoMove

      public Move redoMove()
      Redoes the last undone move by popping it from the redo stack and pushing it back onto the undo stack.

      Returns the move that was redone to restore the next game state. If there is no move to redo, returns null.

      Gibt zurück:
      The move representing the next game state, or null if redo is not possible.

    • clearRedo

      public void clearRedo()
      Clears the redo stack by removing every element.

    • getUndoMoves

      public Stack<Move> getUndoMoves()
      Getter for the undo moves stack.
      Gibt zurück:
      The stack containing the moves that can be undone.

    • getRedoMoves

      public Stack<Move> getRedoMoves()
      Getter for the redo moves stack.
      Gibt zurück:
      The stack containing the moves that can be redone.
